Eligibility & Age Limits: Entry: 18–60 yrs; Max cover ceasing age: 75 yrs; Rider term ≤ base policy term; Same PPT as base.
Applicable Base Policies: Allowed under eligible participating & non-participating base plans.
Rider Sum Assured Limits: Min Rider SA: As per base plan; Max: Cannot exceed base SA.
Premium Basis & Modes: Premium payable with base policy in same mode (Y/HY/Q/M); regular/limited-pay same as base.
Benefit Description: Additional Term Sum Assured payable on death of Life Assured; no maturity benefit.
Exclusions: Excludes suicide within 12 months; other exclusions follow base policy.
Limitations & Conditions: Rider SA must not exceed base SA; no benefit on survival; must be in-force at death.
Revival Rules: Revival only along with base-policy revival within 5 years.
Multiple Rider Attachment Allowed?: Yes, subject to base policy rules.
Interaction with Base Policy: Death benefit is paid in addition to base policy SA.
Termination Rules: Ends on death, expiry of rider term, base-policy lapse, or cancellation.
